Awakening from the Meaning crisis is a video series made by [[John Vervaeke]]. It is the source of numerous ideas notably the [[Seven Plagues]] (now expanded to nine) and the [[Three Orders]].


[[Kamidere|Immanuelle]] was involved with the community since early [[2020]] and studied the entire video series in preparation for the [[2021 revelation]] alongside [[Dr K|Dr K's]] guide. They made the series [[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] commenting on it in 2022.

== Glossary ==
Glossary to be filled up<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20210111122323/https://awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com/glossary</ref>

* [[Addiction]]
* [[Agape]]
* [[Agent-Arena relationship|Agent-Arena Relationship]]
* [[Anagoge]]
* [[Being Mode]]
* [[Cognitive Fluency]]
* [[Confirmation Bias]]
* [[Contemplative Practices]]
* [[Disruptive Strategies]]
* [[Domicide]]
* [[Dukkha]]
* [[Forgiveness]]
* [[Gestalt]]
* [[Gnosis]]
* [[Having Mode]]
* [[Joy]]
* [[Kairos]]
* [[Knowledge]]
* [[Lectio Divina]]
* [[Love]]
* [[Meaning]]
* [[Meditation]]
* [[Metanoia]]
* [[Modal Confusion]]
* [[Myth]]
* [[Narrative Order]]
* [[Nirvana]]
* [[Nomological Order]]
* [[Non-Duality]]
* [[Normative Order]]
* [[Ontonormativity]]
* [[Parasitic Processing]]
* [[Participatory Knowledge]]
* [[Premeditatio]]
* [[Procheiron]]
* [[Prophet]]
* [[Psychotechnology]]
* [[Pure Consciousness Event]]
* [[Resonant At-Onement]]
* [[Sacred]]
* [[Sati]]
* [[Shamanism]]
* [[Wisdom]]
*

== References ==
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Awakening from the Meaning Crisis]][[Category:Books]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
